## Meeting Purpose

[Define the technical approach for the growthx.ai website redesign.](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Problem:** The current hardcoded site prevents non-technical marketing staff from making content updates, creating a bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [**Solution:** A Sanity CMS will be implemented to enable a "composable" architecture, allowing marketing to build new pages from a library of reusable blocks.](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [**Ownership:** 35 will own the full Sanity setup and frontend build to ensure a seamless, integrated workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [**Next Step:** Frank will provide a project proposal with a timeline and cost estimate.](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Hardcoded Site Bottleneck

  - [The growthx.ai site is hardcoded, preventing non-technical marketing staff from making content updates.](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [This creates a dependency on developers for simple tasks, such as adding new pages or components.](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [**Goal:** Enable marketing to launch new pages in under one day.](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)

### Solution: Composable Sanity CMS

  - [A Sanity CMS will be implemented to support a "composable" architecture.](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [**How it works:** Designs are broken into reusable blocks → marketing staff can drag-and-drop these blocks to build any page layout.](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This approach directly solves the content bottleneck and aligns with 35's preferred workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [**Decision:** 35 will own the full Sanity setup (schema, config) and frontend build.](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
      - [**Why:** To ensure a seamless, integrated workflow and avoid communication overhead between two teams.](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)

### Project Logistics

  - [**Timeline:** "As soon as possible," but no hard deadline exists.](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [**Communication:** A shared Slack channel will be created for progress tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
      - [**Contacts:** Renato (growthx.ai), Ed (growthx.ai), Frank, Pascal, & Sam (35).](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [**Design Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
      - [Mobile designs will be created in parallel with the backend build.](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
      - [The Figma file will be used for asynchronous feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
      - [A formal design system can be developed later if needed.](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [**Dark Mode:** A site-wide toggle will be implemented for a consistent user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)

### Technical Requirements

  - [**Analytics:** Existing analytics (PostHog, Google Analytics) must be migrated.](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
      - [Renato will provide a full list of required tags.](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [**Forms:** The current Default form integration will be retained.](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
      - [**Context:** A future project may involve building a custom meeting-booking experience.](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Renato:**](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
      - [Create a shared Slack channel.](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
      - [Provide a list of all analytics tags to be migrated.](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [**Frank:**](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
      - [Deliver a project proposal with a timeline and cost estimate.](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [**Frank & Sam:**](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
      - [Begin mobile designs in Figma.](https://fathom.video/share/7gyYAZKuvw-yS9eCURWuYRTqoBQZmGGH?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
